## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the feature or workflow improvement.

## Workflow Stage

- [ ] Import
- [ ] Parse
- [ ] Review
- [ ] Edit
- [ ] Export
- [ ] Save / Load

## Why It Matters

Explain how this would improve internal lab usability.

## Extra Context

Optional notes, examples, or references.
